title: Section 5
content: The Board shall be a body corporate by the name of the 1[2* * * Coffee Board], having perpetual succession and a common seal, with power to acquire and hold property, both movable and immovable, and to contract, and shall by the said name sue and be sued.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 7 of 1943, s. 4, for "Indian Coffee Market Expansion Board". 2. The word "Indian" omitted by Act 50 of 1954, s. 7 (w.e.f. 1-8-1955).
